ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type (e.g., pounds, tons, units) */,
  "data_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., material usage, production output) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "material_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  "material_category" TEXT /* Category of the material type (e.g., agricultural, energy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production data point */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "material_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material type */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of production */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of production */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the production value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_material_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_type_id") REFERENCES material_types ("material_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "month_current" (
  "month_current_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month's production data */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of production for the current month */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the current month's production data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_current_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_month_current_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "month_prior_year" (
  "month_prior_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prior year's production data */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of production for the same month in the prior year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the prior year's production data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_prior_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_month_prior_year_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ytd_current" (
  "ytd_current_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each YTD production data */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of production for the current year YTD */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the YTD production data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ytd_current_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ytd_current_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ytd_prior_year" (
  "ytd_prior_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prior year's YTD production data */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of production for the prior year YTD */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the prior year's YTD production data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ytd_prior_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ytd_prior_year_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government agency, private company) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of import */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the imported file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "data_validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation */,
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data import */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_import_id") REFERENCES data_imports ("data_import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "data_analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analytics result */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production data */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date of analytics */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analytics */,
  "analytics_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the analytics result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analytics_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_analytics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data analytics result */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the report file */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_analytics_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_analytics_id") REFERENCES data_analytics ("data_analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_data" (
  "industry_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry data point */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the industry data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_data_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industry_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)
